laws.title: Checkout process clarity
laws.description: Lack of progress indicators during the checkout process.
laws.remediation: Include a step-by-step progress bar during checkout.

laws.title: Navigation Complexity
laws.description: Overlapping categories in dropdowns make navigation cumbersome.
laws.remediation: Simplify navigation by restructuring category hierarchies.

laws.title: Search Functionality
laws.description: Search bar does not provide instant suggestions or autocomplete.
laws.remediation: Implement live search suggestions and autocomplete functionality.

laws.title: Account Settings Accessibility
laws.description: Difficult to locate account settings amidst numerous links.
laws.remediation: Group account-related actions under a unified dropdown.

laws.title: Error Messaging
laws.description: Vague error messages on payment failures.
laws.remediation: Provide specific error messages with step-by-step solutions.
